31 
LAB_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Laboratory Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the laboratory provider category; ever in 
the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: LAB_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: LAB_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No
